capabilities.title: Single-Image Reference Preset
capabilities.description: Create a reusable Media Preset with one image input and editable fields inferred from the request.
fixed_ingredients: style mechanics from the current structured style brief
composition, lighting, mood, and presentation traits analyzed for this workflow
one image input selected by the user
variable_ingredients: editable fields requested by the user

image_slots.label: Personal Reference
image_slots.help_text: Image requested by the user, such as a face, body, product, object, scene, or background.

questions: Should this image input be required every time, or optional?
Which one or two editable fields should the preset expose?

refinement.default_detail: tighten the prompt so the next run follows the approved reference style more closely
refinement.output_aware_detail: compare against the latest generated output and strengthen the missing visual traits from the approved reference style
refinement.prompt:
[[base_prompt]]

Strengthen the next version by adding more of [[refinement_details]].

capabilities.title: Multi-Image Reference Preset
capabilities.description: Create a reusable Media Preset with two image inputs and editable fields inferred from the reference analysis.
fixed_ingredients: style mechanics from the current structured style brief
composition, lighting, mood, and presentation traits analyzed for this workflow
image inputs selected by the user
variable_ingredients: editable fields inferred from the reference analysis

image_slots.label: Image Input 1
image_slots.help_text: Image requested by the user, such as a face, product, object, scene, body, or background.

image_slots.label: Image Input 2
image_slots.help_text: Second runtime image requested by the user, such as a pose, outfit, product angle, object, scene, or background.

questions: Do you want these image inputs to be required every time, or optional?
Should I keep the editable fields minimal, or add one more field for details the user changes each run?

refinement.default_detail: tighten the prompt so the next run follows the approved reference style more closely
refinement.output_aware_detail: compare against the latest generated output and strengthen the missing visual traits from the approved reference style

detail_rules.detail: weight the current reference style, composition, lighting, and presentation more strongly
restore important visual details from the approved style that are missing from the last output

refinement.prompt:
[[base_prompt]]

Strengthen the next version by adding more of [[refinement_details]].

capabilities.title: Reference Style Preset
capabilities.description: Create a reusable Media Preset from the currently attached reference style.
fixed_ingredients: style mechanics from the current structured style brief
composition, lighting, mood, and presentation traits analyzed for this workflow
variable_ingredients: editable fields inferred from the reference analysis
questions: Do you want an image input, such as a face, product, object, or background?
Should the preset stay minimal with one or two editable fields, or should I add a specific field?

refinement.default_detail: tighten the prompt so the next run follows the approved reference style more closely
refinement.output_aware_detail: compare against the latest generated output and strengthen the missing visual traits from the approved reference style

detail_rules.detail: weight the current reference style, composition, lighting, and presentation more strongly
restore important visual details from the approved style that are missing from the last output

refinement.prompt:
[[base_prompt]]

Strengthen the next version by adding more of [[refinement_details]].
